payload.author: claude
payload.body: Shipped as R0019 no-unchecked-len-arith (detection-as-lint; bare +/-/* with a .len() operand forces an explicit checked_/saturating_/wrapping_ choice). The lowering form (auto-rewrite to checked ops) needs type info — out of scope for the syntax-level pipeline. EVAL VALIDATION STILL OWED: implemented ungated by owner decision 2026-06-10.
